content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Rooms and Staircases". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1244/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of rooms. Then n lines follow, each containing two integers a and b, which are the number of rooms on the current floor and the number of staircases from the current floor to the next floor.
content.outputFormat: Output the minimum number of staircases that must be built to satisfy the conditions.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to calculate the minimum number of staircases required for each floor and then sum them up.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
a = []
b = []
for _ in range(n):
    ai, bi = map(int, input().split())
    a.append(ai)
    b.append(bi)
ans = 0
for i in range(n - 1):
    ans += max(0, a[i] - b[i])
print(ans)
